daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic rn. The cosmos is giving you permission to take up space and be unapologetically yourself. Channel that Leo heat into something creative—people are literally magnetized to your energy today.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, there's an invitation to lean into vulnerability. Your authentic self is your biggest flex. If someone's been on your mind, the universe says the timing could actually work out this time.
daily.career: Your ideas hit different today. Don't sleep on that project you've been thinking about—trust your instincts and pitch it. Your confidence is contagious, and people are ready to get behind what you're building.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishing. Dance, walk, stretch—whatever makes you feel alive. Hydration is key; your system's asking for more water than usual. Listen to what feels nourishing.

weekly.overview: Your energy is magnetic this week, Leo. The cosmos is whispering that it's time to lean into your authentic self without apology. Trust the momentum building around you—something real is shifting beneath the surface.
weekly.love: Venus is playing in your favor, but the real magic happens when you're vulnerable first. Whether single or coupled, let people see the parts of you that usually stay hidden. That's where genuine connection lives.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. This is the week to speak up in that meeting or pitch what you've been sitting on. The universe is backing your confidence, so channel it into something tangible and watch doors open.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for presence this week. Whether it's moving intentionally, resting deeply, or checking in with how you actually feel—honor those signals. Energy shifts when you listen to yourself first.
